title: Human Resources Project Management for Talent Acquisition Director
excerpt: I am the Associate Director of Talent Acquisition & Retention. I manage about 10+ jobs and have many other moving pieces in my day to day. Such as scheduling phone screens, interviews, panel interviews, final interviews,…

posts.author: jasmineprimas (Jasmine)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am the Associate Director of Talent Acquisition & Retention. I manage about 10+ jobs and have many other moving pieces in my day to day. Such as scheduling phone screens, interviews, panel interviews, final interviews, collect notes from phone screens and send them to the hiring manager, data analytics, etc.
I need help setting up Monday.com - with the dashboards, automations, etc.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jasmineprimas

Welcome to the Community!

We can definitely assist you We’re all about making it easy for you, so please complete this form and then let’s connect and discuss. If you can provide a more detailed workflow outline in the form, we can be ready with a personalized and relevant demonstration we can review together.

Looking forward to it!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jasmineprimas

Welcome to the community! With intuitive monday.com automations, you can take your workflow a step further! This incredible functionality allows you to build your own automation or select from pre-built templates. Build out new combinations personalized to your process’s requirements and make them fit impeccably into your workflow! Another great approach to display your important data, and view all projects in one single interface is through dashboards. With over 30 dynamic widgets, you can build tailored dashboards and visualize project progress, monitor budget, assess teammate’s workload, and others.

If you’re seeking help to set up automations and dashboards, hire monday.com consultants from a recognized partner company. They help you keep focused and motivated on high-level objectives and improve productivity!

posts.author: preslechoni1985 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve built out a board that tracks hiring stages, feedback, and onboarding steps all in one. I tied it to my dashboards to get an overview of where things stand each week. As someone with a shrm-cp, I needed something that let me balance compliance tracking and team workflows without switching apps constantly, and monday.com gave me just enough flexibility without being overwhelming.
